features: 💕【SUPER-VALUE 】Our value pack comes with 45PCS kraft paper bags,in 3 sizes: 5.2"x3.5"x8" 15pcs , 8"x4"x10" 15pcs ,10"x5"x12.6" 15pcs . small, medium and large kraft paper bags to meet your different needs

♻️【PREMIUM KRAFT PAPER GIFT BAGS】 :Our gift bags made from 120 gsm black kraft paper,We use sturdy heavy-duty glue to fix the twisted paper handles .The bottom of each bag is hand-bonded,These assorted sizes gift bags can stand independently and is easy to carry.these gift bags can be recycled, reused, and composted.

💕【 PAPER GIFT BAGS DIY IDEAS】:The black kraft bags are blank, you could decorate them with drawing ,coloring ,paper-cutting,stickers etc, as gift bags to your special ones. Also, as retail bags, you could staple your business card or stamp the outside of the bag with your logo on.
💕【VERSATILE】:These kraft paper bags are perfect for small business,retail, grocery,party favor, goodie,crafts,merchandise,shopping bags Ideal for birthday parties, weddings,baby showers
💕【SHOPPING WORRY-FREE】.If you are not satisfied with this gift paper bag for any reason, please feel free to contact our customer service team, we will solve the problem for you within 24 hours.
description: Made in special dust-free manufacture workshop for the premium quality paper bags. Each batch of paper bags will experience the strict load-bearing test randomly. SIZE : 5.25"W x 3.75"D x 8"H,8"x4"x10",10"x5"x12.6" Package : 45pcs per
